evals.prompt: Run opportunity review for an engagement with discovery JSON, gaps report, and no diagnostic.
evals.expected_output: {slug}-opportunity-summary.md and {slug}-opportunity-profile.json produced with MEDDPIC assessment, technical landscape tables, open questions, and a proceed / continue discovery / not-qualified recommendation.
assertions: Stops if discovery JSON is missing
Uses gaps report to populate clarification questions
Technical landscape is table-based with follow-up / clarification columns
JSON profile includes demo_scope_signals for downstream platform audit

evals.prompt: Update the opportunity summary with new follow-up call notes.
evals.expected_output: Existing opportunity summary is updated as a living document with changelog entry; prior team annotations are preserved.
assertions: Reads existing summary and profile first
Preserves inline team notes in brackets
Updates only changed facts and open questions
Recomputes qualification recommendation if new information changes MEDDPIC
